strategy: Expect a -200% accuracy aura of your own school on everyone from round 1 - she applies it to anyone without an aura, and casting your own aura just gets the aura recast on you. Plan around it instead of fighting it.
Pack off-school hits (treasure cards or a secondary school). The aura only debuffs spells of the target's own school, so off-school spells still land.
Skip Feint entirely - any Feint on her triggers Camp Bandit, and Mass Feint does not avoid it. Use regular traps and blades instead.
She takes +15% from Myth, Life, and Death and resists Balance 40% - pick your off-school cards accordingly.
Clear the three Fonts with an AoE so they die with her. 7,000 health falls to a modest blade-and-trap setup once your accuracy problem is solved.
cheatNotes: From round 1, anyone without an aura gets a -200% accuracy aura of their own school for the rest of the fight. Spells from other schools are unaffected, so off-school hits are the safe play.
Astral or Shadow summoned minions get targeted but nothing sticks - no aura exists for those schools.
Dual-school summoned minions get the -200% accuracy aura for their second school.
Casting your own aura just makes her recast the aura on you, so you cannot overwrite the accuracy debuff. Do not waste turns on Star spells.
Any Feint on her is answered with Camp Bandit. Leave Feint out of your deck.
Mass Feint still triggers the Camp Bandit response - there is no Feint workaround.
